## Problem

What estate-monitoring question or workflow can't you answer/do today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like RepoWrangler to do.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about (including provider-native tooling).

## Additional context

Provider (GitHub/GitLab/other), plan/tier constraints, scale (repository count), etc.
